title: Guacamole
ingredients: 1 small tomato, seeded and diced finely
1 tsp. good quality salt (Maldon is my preference)
Juice from one lime or more to taste
¼ cup chopped red onions or green onions, optional
Pico de gallo or salsa, optional
instructions: Peel and halve the avocados and place them in a bowl.
Smash the avocados with a pastry blender or fork.
Taste and adjust seasonings and heat as desired.
notes: Good quality salt (or good quality garlic salt) is a must!
When avocados are difficult to find or poor quality, sour cream can be added to extend the guacamole.
Have fun with this recipe and make it your own!
